_meta.description: SAST rule patterns for Solana Auditor Skill
_meta.note: Rules 27-50 (Token-2022 Transfer Hook, Pinocchio/Native, AI Agent Safety) require manual review — no automated patterns exist

rules.description: Function performs privileged operation without obvious signer validation
rules.impact: Unauthorized state mutation possible if account is not properly validated
rules.recommendation: Add #[account(signer)] constraint and verify signer's pubkey matches expected authority

rules.description: Account initialized without owner constraint
rules.impact: Account can be initialized by anyone who knows the PDA seed
rules.recommendation: Add #[account(owner = program_id)] constraint

rules.description: Hardcoded bump seed -- program address collision risk
rules.impact: If collision occurs, attacker could initialize their own account at the PDA
rules.recommendation: Use find_program_address with canonical bump: let bump = bump_seed.unwrap()

rules.description: CPI call with program_id that may not be verified
rules.impact: Attacker could redirect CPI to malicious program
rules.recommendation: Validate program_id: require!(actual_program == expected_program)

rules.description: Token program mismatch -- spl_token used with Token-2022 extensions
rules.impact: Extension features won't work correctly
rules.recommendation: Use spl_token_2022::ID and appropriate extension types

rules.description: NOT using checked arithmetic on token amounts
rules.impact: Overflow/underflow could drain or mint unintended amounts
rules.recommendation: Use checked_add, checked_mul, saturating_add for all token math

rules.description: close instruction with authority account -- verify it's the rent recipient
rules.impact: Lamports could be sent to wrong destination
rules.recommendation: Ensure close target is the account that will receive the rent exemption refund

rules.description: Privileged instruction without signer check
rules.impact: Anyone can call admin functions
rules.recommendation: Add #[account(signer)] and validate authority PDA

rules.description: Upgrade authority pattern detected -- verify governance controls
rules.impact: Program can be upgraded without multisig approval
rules.recommendation: Use Timelock + multisig for upgrade authority

rules.description: panic! without custom error -- loses error context
rules.impact: Audit findings can't distinguish panic sources
rules.recommendation: Replace panic! with custom error: Err(Error::Custom(NOT_AUTHORIZED)

rules.description: init_if_needed without discriminator reinitialization guard
rules.impact: Account can be reinitialized with new data by anyone
rules.recommendation: Track initialized state in discriminator or use close + reinit pattern

rules.description: Account allocated with zero space -- rent exemption violated
rules.impact: Account cannot hold data without paying rent
rules.recommendation: Set space = T::LAYOUT: bytes. Use AccountSerialize + AccountDeserialize for dynamic sizing

rules.description: Oracle read without settlement delay -- flash loan susceptible
rules.impact: Price can be manipulated within same transaction to drain protocol
rules.recommendation: Add settlement period -- price updates take effect after N slots

rules.description: CEI pattern violation -- external call before state update enables reentrancy
rules.impact: Attacker re-enters contract in same tx, drains funds via race condition
rules.recommendation: Apply checks-effects-interactions: update state BEFORE external call. Use reentrancy guard.

rules.description: Iterating remaining_accounts without index-based validation
rules.impact: Attacker can reorder accounts to bypass checks
rules.recommendation: Validate each account's key BEFORE use. Store count: let remaining = remaining_accounts.len(); assert_eq!(expected_len, remaining.len());

rules.description: Multiple instructions with similar names -- discriminator collision risk
rules.impact: Wrong instruction could be dispatched
rules.recommendation: Use unique discriminator prefixes. Audit discriminator assignment for collisions.

rules.description: AccountLoader used without owner verification
rules.impact: Attacker could deserialize account data not owned by this program
rules.recommendation: Use .load() with .owner() check, or use Account instead

rules.description: BorshDeserialize without Result handling -- panics on malformed data
rules.impact: Malicious tx data causes panic, enabling denial of service
rules.recommendation: Use try_from_slice and handle Result: data.try_into()?

rules.description: Anchor verify constraint disabled -- constraint bypassed
rules.impact: Account constraint not enforced by Anchor
rules.recommendation: Enable verify constraint or add manual validation with require!()

rules.description: Token-2022 extension order violation -- memo must precede transfer_fee
rules.impact: Transfer fee extension silently fails if initialized out of order
rules.recommendation: Initialize extensions in order: MemoTransfer BEFORE TransferFeeConfig

rules.description: CPI callback with PDA -- attacker can reenter via unexpected signer PDA
rules.impact: Callback reentrancy bypasses caller's guard because callee uses different PDA
rules.recommendation: Validate callback signer PDA matches expected program-derived address. Add callback guard.

rules.description: init_if_needed and close in same or nearby instructions -- race condition
rules.impact: Attacker front-runs close with init_if_needed to reinitialize, draining rent refund
rules.recommendation: Make init and close ATOMIC or use close authority + state versioning

rules.description: CPI to memo program with user-supplied data -- log injection risk
rules.impact: Attacker injects misleading memos into transaction logs to social-engineer users
rules.recommendation: Do not pass user-controlled data to memo. Validate memo content before CPI.

rules.description: Remaining accounts slice passed to invoke_signed with wrong bounds
rules.impact: Signature verification bypassed -- wrong accounts signed for wrong instruction
rules.recommendation: Validate accounts array length BEFORE invoke_signed. assert_eq!(expected, accounts.len())

rules.description: Using associated token address with LUT -- verify account contents
rules.impact: Attacker manipulates LUT to substitute unexpected accounts
rules.recommendation: Validate LUT contents: verify account is in expected lookup table before use

rules.description: Flash loan pattern -- verify oracle settlement across ALL programs in CPI chain
rules.impact: Flash loan in Program A manipulates oracle to exploit Program C via Program B CPI
rules.recommendation: Check settlement slot + verify price in ALL programs in CPI chain. Add atomicity guard.
